title: TYPING has no subscription check; unsubscribed users can broadcast presence to all peers
description: When require_subscription=true, BROADCAST/WHISPER/GROUP_SEND are subscription-gated but TYPING is not. An unsubscribed user can repeatedly send TYPING {typing:true} at the rate limit (120/min), broadcasting presence notifications to every connected client for free. This bypasses the subscription gate on message sending and leaks the sender's presence/activity. Fix: add require_subscription check to TYPING before the rate limit check.
